name: Flooring Installation
meta_title: Flooring Installation Halifax NS | Vinyl Plank, Hardwood, LVP | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Professional flooring installation in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Vinyl plank, LVP, hardwood, tile & subfloor repair. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "The foundation of every great space starts beneath your feet."
Professional flooring installation across Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, and the entire HRM. Vinyl plank, LVP, hardwood, tile, laminate, and full subfloor preparation -- done right the first time.
what_we_do: Vinyl Plank Flooring — Durable, waterproof, and available in a wide range of wood-look finishes. Vinyl plank is one of the most popular choices for Halifax homeowners -- it handles moisture well and stands up to heavy foot traffic, making it ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and entryways.

Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) — A step up in thickness, texture, and realism. LVP offers a premium look and feel with enhanced durability, and it is a smart choice for high-traffic areas in both homes and commercial spaces. Click-lock or glue-down -- we do both.

Hardwood Flooring — Timeless beauty and long-term value. We install solid hardwood and engineered hardwood with precision fitting, proper expansion gaps, and clean transitions. A natural choice for living rooms, dining areas, and bedrooms.

Tile Flooring — Porcelain, ceramic, and natural stone tile installation. Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, mudrooms, and commercial entrances. We ensure level surfaces, consistent grout lines, and sealed finishes that last.

Laminate Flooring — An affordable alternative that still delivers a clean, modern look. Laminate installs quickly and works well for bedrooms, offices, and rental units where budget and durability need to balance.

faqs.question: How much does flooring installation cost in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Flooring costs vary by material, room size, and subfloor prep. Vinyl plank is typically the most affordable option; hardwood and large-format tile run higher. We provide free, itemized quotes — most projects range from a few hundred dollars for a single room to several thousand for a full home.

faqs.question: How long does flooring installation take?
faqs.answer: A single room usually takes one day. A full main floor or multi-room project typically takes two to four days, depending on subfloor conditions, material, and complexity. We'll give you a realistic timeline before starting.

faqs.question: Do you supply the flooring materials or do I need to buy them?
faqs.answer: Either works. We can source materials through our trusted suppliers, or you can supply your own. If you've already purchased a specific product, just let us know and we'll work with what you have.

faqs.question: Can you install new flooring over existing floors?
faqs.answer: In some cases, yes — it depends on subfloor condition, height differences at transitions, and flooring type. We always assess the existing surface first and give you an honest recommendation before any work begins.

faqs.question: What areas in HRM do you serve for flooring?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Halifax Regional Municipality — Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, Sackville, Cole Harbour, Fall River, Eastern Passage, Timberlea, Hammonds Plains, Tantallon, Waverley, Enfield, Elmsdale, Porters Lake, and surrounding communities.

name: Custom Vinyl Staircases
meta_title: Custom Vinyl Staircases Halifax NS | Stair Tread Installation | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Custom vinyl staircase installation in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Precision-cut vinyl stair treads, carpet-to-vinyl conversions & full staircase transformations. Free in-home quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "Precision-cut. Premium finish. The staircase your home deserves."
what_we_do: Precision-Cut Vinyl Stair Treads — Every tread is measured and cut on-site for a perfect fit. No gaps, no shortcuts, no prefab compromises.
Full Staircase Transformations — Complete staircase remodels from top to bottom. We handle demolition, prep, and installation as one seamless project.
Carpet Removal & Vinyl Replacement — Strip out old, worn carpet stairs and replace them with a clean, modern vinyl finish that transforms the entire feel of your home.
Free In-Home Measurement & Quote — We come to you, measure everything in person, and provide a detailed quote with no obligation and no pressure.
Residential & Commercial Projects — From single-family homes in Bedford to commercial properties in downtown Halifax, we handle projects of every scale.

faqs.question: How much does a custom vinyl staircase installation cost in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Cost depends on the number of stairs, vinyl product selected, nosing style, and whether carpet removal is needed. We provide free in-home quotes — most residential staircase projects are priced per stair. Contact us and we'll come take a look with no obligation.

faqs.question: How long does a vinyl staircase installation take?
faqs.answer: Most residential staircases are completed in one to two days. We remove existing material, prepare the substrate, install vinyl treads and nosings precisely, and leave you with a clean, finished staircase.

faqs.question: Can you install vinyl over my existing carpet stairs?
faqs.answer: Carpet must be removed first — you can't properly install vinyl directly over carpet. Carpet removal is included in our staircase packages. We prep the underlying wood to ensure a solid, long-lasting substrate for the vinyl.

faqs.question: What vinyl products do you use for staircases?
faqs.answer: We work with quality LVP and vinyl stair nosing products from trusted suppliers. We can show you samples and help you choose a colour and texture that matches your existing flooring — or work with a specific product you've already selected.

faqs.question: Do vinyl staircases look as good as hardwood?
faqs.answer: When installed properly with quality vinyl and matching nosings, the result is sharp, seamless, and modern. Vinyl staircases are also more durable and far easier to maintain than carpet — they don't stain, trap allergens, or show wear the same way. Our gallery shows what a finished install looks like.

name: Drywall Services
meta_title: Drywall Installation & Repair Halifax NS | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Expert drywall installation, repair, and finishing in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Patches, new builds, renovations. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "Seamless walls, clean lines, and a finish that's ready for anything."
what_we_do: New construction drywall installation
Renovation and addition finishing
Basement drywall and ceiling installs
Water damage repair and replacement
Hole, crack, and dent patching
Joint taping and compound finishing
Level 4 and Level 5 finish work
Ceiling and wall texture matching
Drywall for bathroom and kitchen renovations
Commercial and multi-unit projects

faqs.question: How much does drywall installation cost in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Cost depends on the scope — a small patch is very affordable, while a full basement drywall project is priced per square foot of area. We provide free, itemized quotes after seeing the space so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Can you fix a single hole or do you only do full drywall projects?
faqs.answer: We handle everything — from a single nail pop or small hole to a full room installation. No job is too small. If you have several patches needed around the house, we can knock them all out in one visit.

faqs.question: How long does drywall mud take to dry before painting?
faqs.answer: Standard drywall compound needs about 24 hours per coat under normal conditions (good ventilation, room temperature). Most projects need two to three coats, so budget three to seven days between finishing and painting. We'll advise on the timeline for your specific project.

faqs.question: Do you handle basement drywall in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Yes — basement drywall is one of our most common projects across HRM. We address moisture concerns, install proper framing where needed, hang, tape, and finish to a paint-ready surface.

faqs.question: What does a drywall quote from ETRA include?
faqs.answer: Our quotes cover materials and labour for the agreed scope of work. If anything unexpected comes up — like damaged framing behind the wall — we discuss it with you before proceeding. Our pricing is transparent and honest.

name: Exterior Siding
meta_title: Exterior Siding Installation Halifax NS | Vinyl & Composite Siding | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Professional exterior siding installation in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Vinyl siding, composite siding, wood siding & siding repair. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "Protection that performs and a finish that lasts — built for Nova Scotia weather."
what_we_do: Full Siding Installation Complete tear-off and re-siding for residential and commercial properties across HRM.
Siding Repair & Patching Storm damage, cracked panels, or sections that have come loose — we match and replace without a full re-side.
Weather Barrier & Flashing Proper housewrap, moisture barriers, and flashing around windows and doors for a weather-tight seal.
Soffit, Fascia & Trim Complete exterior finishing, including soffit and fascia replacement, corner trim, and J-channel detailing.
Free On-Site Quotes We visit your property, assess the scope, and provide a detailed quote — always free, always honest.

Vinyl Siding — The most popular choice for homes across Halifax and Dartmouth. Vinyl siding is low-maintenance, weather-resistant, and available in a wide range of colours and profiles. It handles Nova Scotia's freeze-thaw cycles well and won't rot, peel, or need repainting. An excellent balance of durability and value.

Composite Siding — Engineered for performance, composite siding offers the natural appearance of wood with significantly better resistance to moisture and insects. It's a strong choice for homeowners in Bedford, Sackville, and coastal areas of HRM where humidity and salt air accelerate wear on traditional materials.

Wood Siding — Classic character that nothing else replicates. Cedar and spruce siding bring warmth and authenticity to heritage homes and custom builds. We handle proper installation with appropriate sealing and ventilation to maximise its lifespan in Nova Scotia's demanding coastal climate.

faqs.question: What types of siding do you install in Halifax?
faqs.answer: We install vinyl siding, composite siding, and wood siding across Halifax and HRM. Vinyl is the most popular choice for Nova Scotia's climate — durable, low-maintenance, and built to handle freeze-thaw cycles and coastal weather.

faqs.question: How long does exterior siding installation take?
faqs.answer: A typical house siding project takes three to seven days depending on home size, whether existing siding needs removal, and material choice. We'll give you a clear, realistic timeline in your free quote.

faqs.question: Is new siding a good investment in Nova Scotia?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Quality siding protects your home from Halifax's wet, windy winters, improves energy efficiency, and significantly boosts curb appeal and resale value. It's one of the best exterior investments a homeowner can make.

faqs.question: Do you remove old siding before installing new?
faqs.answer: Yes — we remove and dispose of existing siding as part of the project. We inspect the sheathing underneath before installing new material and address any moisture damage we find along the way.

faqs.question: Do you pull permits for siding projects in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Permit requirements depend on the scope and municipality. We'll advise you on whether your project requires a permit and can assist with the process where needed.

name: Decks & Fences
meta_title: Deck & Fence Building Halifax NS | Custom Decks & Fences | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Custom deck builds and fence installations in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Pressure-treated, composite, and cedar decks. Privacy, picket & board-on-board fences. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "Outdoor spaces built to handle Nova Scotia weather and designed to make your property stand out."
what_we_do: Pressure-Treated Lumber — The most popular choice for Halifax decks. Affordable, durable, and treated to resist rot, insects, and moisture. Ideal for homeowners who want a solid deck at a practical price point.

Composite Decking — Low-maintenance boards that won't splinter, warp, or fade. No staining, no sealing — just enjoy it. Perfect for busy families and properties in Dartmouth and Bedford where you want the look of wood without the upkeep.
Cedar Decks — Naturally rot-resistant with a beautiful warm tone. Cedar is a premium choice that ages gracefully and offers a distinctive look that sets your home apart.
Complete Build Service — Footings, framing, decking, stairs, railings, and finishing details. We handle permits, layout, and the full build — you just tell us what you want.
Privacy Fences — Solid panel construction that blocks sightlines and creates a private backyard retreat. The most requested fence style across Halifax and HRM for good reason — it works.
Picket Fences — Classic styling for front yards and gardens. We build traditional and modern picket designs that add curb appeal and define your property without closing it off.

Board-on-Board — Overlapping boards that look great from both sides — no "bad" side for your neighbour. A popular upgrade across Bedford and Dartmouth neighbourhoods for its clean, finished appearance.

Custom Designs — Horizontal slat, lattice-top, mixed-material, and custom gate designs. If you have a vision, we can build it. We work with you to match your home's architecture and your property's layout.

When to Repair vs. Replace — If the footings and framing are sound, a deck resurface or targeted repair is usually the smarter move. We give you an honest assessment — we won't recommend a full rebuild when a repair will do the job.

Railing Upgrades — Swapping old, weathered railings for new aluminum or glass panels is one of the fastest ways to modernize a deck. It changes the entire look — and often improves the view from inside your home too.
Board replacement and resurfacing
Structural joist and beam repair
Post and footing reinforcement
Stair rebuilds and tread replacement
Wood, aluminum, and glass railing installs
Fence post replacement and panel repairs
Full teardown and disposal of old structures

faqs.question: How much does a deck cost in Halifax, NS?
faqs.answer: Deck pricing varies based on size, materials (pressure-treated wood, composite, cedar), railing style, and complexity. A simple ground-level deck typically starts around $8,000–$12,000 for standard materials; composite and elevated builds run higher. We provide detailed free quotes.

faqs.question: Do you need a permit to build a deck in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Generally, yes — decks over a certain height or size require a building permit from HRM. We'll advise you on the requirements for your specific project and can help with the permitting process.

faqs.question: What deck materials do you recommend for Nova Scotia's climate?
faqs.answer: Pressure-treated lumber is reliable and affordable. For low-maintenance longevity, composite decking (like Trex or TimberTech) handles Nova Scotia rain, humidity, and UV well. Cedar is a premium natural option that weathers beautifully. We'll help you pick what's right for your budget.

faqs.question: How long does a deck build take?
faqs.answer: Most residential deck projects take three to seven days from start to finish, depending on size and complexity. We'll confirm the timeline in your free quote before work begins.

faqs.question: Do you build privacy fences in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Yes — we build wood, vinyl, and composite privacy fences across HRM. Whether it's a simple garden fence or a full property perimeter, we handle design, materials, and installation from start to finish.

name: Carpet Installation
meta_title: Carpet Installation Halifax NS | Carpet Stairs & Wall-to-Wall | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Professional carpet installation in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Wall-to-wall carpet, carpet stair runners, carpet stair installation & carpet replacement. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "Wall-to-wall installs, stair runners, and full carpet replacements -- finished with tight corners and clean lines , every time."
what_we_do: Wall-to-Wall Carpet — Full-room broadloom carpet installation for bedrooms, living rooms, basements, and more. Precise fitting around closets, doorways, and transitions.
Carpet Stair Runners — Custom-fitted stair runners that add comfort, reduce noise, and give your staircase a finished, elegant look. Secured properly to prevent shifting or bunching.
Carpet Stair Installation — Full carpet stair wrapping with tight corners and clean lines on every tread and riser. Built to handle heavy foot traffic without loosening over time.
Carpet Replacement — Tear-out of old carpet and underpad, subfloor prep, and fresh installation. We handle everything from start to finish so your floors look new again.
Quality Finishes — Tight corners, clean lines, seamless transitions, and proper stretching throughout. The details matter, and we never cut corners on the finish.

faqs.question: How much does carpet installation cost in Halifax?
faqs.answer: Carpet pricing depends on the area to be covered, carpet grade and pile, and whether stairs are included. We provide free quotes — basic installs are very affordable, and we can show you options across a range of price points.

faqs.question: Do you supply the carpet or do I provide it?
faqs.answer: Either works. We can source carpet through our suppliers, or you can purchase carpet yourself and we'll install it. If you supply your own, just let us know the product so we can ensure we have the right tools and adhesives.

faqs.question: How long does carpet installation take?
faqs.answer: A single room typically takes half a day to a full day. A full-home carpet install usually takes one to two days. Stair carpet is typically completed in a day as well. We'll confirm the timeline in your quote.

faqs.question: Can you install carpet on stairs?
faqs.answer: Yes — carpet stairs are one of our specialties. We do waterfall installs, pattern-matched cuts, and cap-and-band finishes. Tight corners, clean lines, no wrinkles — done properly the first time.

faqs.question: Do you remove the old carpet before installing?
faqs.answer: Yes — old carpet and tack strips are removed and disposed of as part of the job. We prep the subfloor before laying the new carpet and pad so you get a clean, professional finish.

name: Repairs & Renovations
meta_title: Home Repairs & Renovations Halifax NS | Remodels & Handyman | ETRA Pro Services
meta_description: Professional home repairs and renovations in Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford & HRM. Bathroom remodels, kitchen updates, handyman services, water damage repair & more. Free quotes from ETRA Pro Services.
intro: "No job too small. No detail overlooked. From punch-list fixes to full-room remodels across Halifax and HRM."
what_we_do: ☑ Punch-List Repairs All those little things that have been piling up: squeaky doors, cracked trim, loose railings, scuffed walls, sticky drawers. We knock out your entire list efficiently so you can stop thinking about it. Popular across Halifax and Dartmouth for move-in and move-out touch-ups.

■ Single-Room Renovations Want to transform a spare bedroom, refresh a dated living room, or convert a basement space? We handle full single-room renovations from demo to finishing touches. New flooring, fresh drywall, updated trim, paint-ready walls. One room at a time, done right.

◇ Bathroom Remodels From vanity swaps and tile updates to complete gut-and-rebuild bathroom renovations. We handle flooring, walls, fixtures, and finishing. Whether it's a half-bath refresh in Bedford or a full ensuite remodel in Halifax, we deliver clean, modern results.

◆ Kitchen Updates Not every kitchen needs a $60K renovation. We specialize in smart, targeted kitchen updates: new backsplash, cabinet refacing, countertop replacement, updated hardware, and flooring transitions. Real improvements that change the feel of the room without blowing your budget.

✎ General Handyman Work Shelving, door installs, weatherstripping, fixture swaps, minor framing, closet organizers, and more. If you've got a project that needs a skilled set of hands, we're the call to make. Serving all of HRM with reliable, same-week scheduling whenever possible.

● Water Damage Repair Water damage doesn't wait, and neither should your repair. We handle drywall replacement, subfloor repair, mould remediation prep, trim restoration, and moisture-damaged flooring throughout Halifax and Dartmouth. We get to the root of the issue and fix it properly.

▵ Trim & Finishing Work Baseboards, crown moulding, window casings, door trim, wainscoting, and custom millwork finishing. The trim is what makes a room look finished and professional. Whether you're completing a renovation or upgrading the details in an older Halifax home, our trim work is precise and paint-ready. We take pride in tight mitre cuts, seamless joints, and clean lines that bring a space together.
process: You Reach Out — Call, text, email, or use the form below. Tell us what you need and we'll respond fast, usually the same day.
Free Quote & Walk-Through — We visit your home, assess the work, and provide a detailed quote. No pressure, no commitment.
We Get to Work — Once approved, we schedule promptly and show up on time. We keep you updated at every step and work clean.
Final Walk-Through — We walk through the completed project together. You're not satisfied until we are. That's the ETRA standard.

faqs.question: What kinds of repairs does ETRA Pro Services handle?
faqs.answer: We handle a wide range of residential repairs — drywall patches, flooring repairs, trim and baseboard, cabinet adjustments, door and window trim, small tile fixes, caulking, and general punch-list work. If you're not sure if we cover something, just ask — we're happy to help.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote for a repair project?
faqs.answer: Contact us by phone or through the form below. For most repairs we can give a rough estimate over the phone; for larger or more complex jobs we'll schedule a free on-site visit to give you an accurate quote.

faqs.question: Can you do a single-room renovation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We take on single-room projects all the time — a bedroom refresh, a bathroom update, a basement finish, or a kitchen touch-up. No project is too small, and every job gets the same level of care.

faqs.question: What areas do you cover for repair and renovation work?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Halifax Regional Municipality — Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, Sackville, Cole Harbour, Fall River, Eastern Passage, Timberlea, Hammonds Plains, Tantallon, Waverley, Enfield, Elmsdale, Porters Lake, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: How quickly can ETRA start on a repair project?
faqs.answer: It depends on our current schedule, but we work hard to accommodate timely repairs. Contact us and let us know what you need — we'll give you an honest timeline and do our best to fit you in quickly.
